item.title: Rubio says US and Europe 'belong together' despite tensions
item.description: The US Secretary of State reassures European leaders that the Trump administration backs the transatlantic alliance.

item.title: Casey Wasserman to sell talent agency after Epstein fallout
item.description: The prominent agent and LA Olympics chief has come under scrutiny over past ties with Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell.

item.title: Tribes grant the Colorado River legal personhood - can this help save it?
item.description: The river, which runs through seven US states that share it, is currently facing the worst drought in 1,200 years.

item.title: Police activity under way near Nancy Guthrie's home
item.description: A search has been carried out in Tuscon, Arizona, close to where the 84-year-old was abducted nearly two weeks ago.

item.title: Watch: 'I am a survivor' Gisèle Pelicot tells BBC Newsnight
item.description: Ms Pelicot reveals it is "inconceivable" that the man she shared her life with "could have committed these horrors".
